prestazioni: Full bolt-on S63B44TU (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) Stage 2+ ECU flash via MHD OTS 'M6 Competition' map with custom ethanol flex-fuel calibration (E60-E85 blend) and upgraded in-tank Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump with dual Bosch 044 high-pressure pumps for sustained 750whp on 93 octane (1000whp+ on E85)

Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285S-G turbochargers (82mm, 85lb/min) with billet compressor wheels, ceramic-coated turbine housings, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, paired with custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipes (catless) and GESI 3.5-inch catted mid-pipes with 200-cell metallic substrates for emissions compliance

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Wavetrac T-56 Magnum XL 6-speed manual transmission swap with dual-disc Sachs Performance clutch (400Nm torque capacity), 3.91:1 M6 Competition rear differential with Wavetrac LSD, and G-Power carbon-fiber driveshaft with upgraded CV joints and reinforced half-shafts
estetica: G-Power Hurricane RS widebody conversion kit (E63-specific) with carbon-fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts, including custom 3D-printed air channels for brake cooling and rear wing mounts for a 1.8m carbon-fiber GT3-style wing (Vorsteiner replica)

OEM+ M6 Competition front bumper retrofit with custom LED angel eyes (Lux H8 V4) and Hella 500 fog light deletes replaced with carbon-fiber brake ducts, paired with a custom matte Nardo Grey (A96) wrap with gloss black accents on the kidney grilles and mirror caps

Full interior carbon-fiber overhaul: Status Gruppe carbon-fiber M6 Competition steering wheel with Alcantara grip, Recaro Pole Position seats (E63-specific mounts) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
